price.name: amount
price.label: Net price
price.description: Internal placeholder (to prevent conflicts with line item property of same name)

price.name: hs_cost_of_goods_sold
price.label: Unit cost
price.description: The amount that sold goods cost the HubSpot customer

price.name: hs_pricing_model
price.label: Pricing model
price.description: Defines the pricing model as either 'flat' or one of three tiered options

options.label: Flat
options.description: Price is multiplied by quantity. Default option when property is null.

options.label: Volume-based
options.description: All units are priced per unit based on the total quantity.

options.label: Stair-step
options.description: The total cost is a fixed price based on the tier reached, not per unit.

options.label: Graduated
options.description: The total cost is the sum of unit prices from each tier reached.

price.name: recurringbillingfrequency
price.label: Billing frequency
price.description: How often a product with recurring billing is billed. It informs the pricing calculation for deals and quotes. Products with one-time billing aren’t included.

multi_currency_prices.name: hs_product_bundle_supported_currencies
multi_currency_prices.label: Product bundle supported currencies
multi_currency_prices.description: Internal property used to build up hs_supported_currencies. If this is a Product bundle, then this represents the set of currencies supported by all of the associated Bundle Items

multi_currency_prices.name: hs_product_supported_currencies
multi_currency_prices.label: Product supported currencies
multi_currency_prices.description: Internal property used to build up hs_supported_currencies. If this is a simple Product, then this represents the set of currencies supported by the pricing related properties on this Product

multi_currency_prices.name: hs_supported_currencies
multi_currency_prices.label: Supported currencies
multi_currency_prices.description: The set of currencies supported by this Product
multi_currency_prices.calculationFormula: if if is_present(string(hs_bundle_type)) then string(hs_bundle_type) else 'none' equals 'none' then string(hs_product_supported_currencies) else string(hs_product_bundle_supported_currencies)

term.name: hs_recurring_billing_start_date
term.label: Start Date
term.description: Recurring billing start date for a line item
